headlines.title: JP Morgan: UAE Could Attract More U.S. Investment After OPEC Exit

headlines.title: The Iran War Has Already Destroyed 1.6 Million Bpd in Oil Demand

headlines.title: Japan Weighs $3 Billion Power Subsidies as LNG Crunch Bites
